calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Feb-28-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Patrick Heard.
Petitioner: Rui Juan Mei, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Shu Ying Qiu, and with Cantonese Interpreter: Jenny Chingyu Yau.
Petitioner and Interpreter were sworn and examined.
Co-Petitioner: Man Tin Yau, not present in court, but signed the Petition consenting to the Name Change of the Minor.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Rose Ying Rong.
Decree signed in open court.
